summary: The diff correctly implements REQ-1 by updating the Odisha subsidy structure in OdishaGuide.tsx (hardcoded data) and in translations.ts for all three language variants (English, Hindi, Odia). All three tiers show the correct Central + State + Total values, and the 3 kW+ tier includes the 'Maximum cap' label. No layout, styling, animation, or backend changes are detected.
